programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger runs for mayor of Adventure Bay, his Mayor Mobile runs out of control; when Ryder and the pups visit Tracker and Carlos in the jungle, a group of monkeys finds itself in sticky bubble trouble.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Stop a Super Shaker; Pups Save a Flying Farmhouse
programme.desc: Farmer Al's harvest machine goes haywire and shakes up Adventure Bay, even threatening to rock the Lookout off its foundation; Farmer Al has a wild dream that the PAW Patrol must rescue him and Yumi when his animals start acting like humans.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Hum-Dino
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger and his Kitties go to Dino Wilds for Dino acting lessons but somehow find themselves bound for Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: Sid Swashbuckle the Pirate and his first pup mate, Arrby, steal the giant pearl-making shell that gives Puplantis its magic.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Chalk Art; Pups Save the Hot Potato
programme.desc: The Mini Patrol and the Pups race to save a mural before it rains; Farmer Al and Yumi discover their garden is full of holes and their one-of-a-kind potato is missing.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save Their Digi-Tal Friends; Pups Save the Rainbow
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol must save the day when two overly helpful robots take on more than they can handle; in a dream, Mayor Humdinger finds a prism that makes rainbows and drains Adventure Bay of color; the pups must restore color to Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Big Book Delivery; Pups Save the Puppets
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's kitties make off with Mayor Goodway's book delivery truck; Julius and Julia get into a sticky situation when the paper bag puppets they created for a puppet show become stuck on the antlers of a deer.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: A collection of Tracker's greatest rescues with the PAW Patrol.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Waiter-Bot; Pups Stop a Pie-Clone
programme.desc: Mr. Porter's new high-tech waiter robot helps around the café, but it can't stop cleaning; it's up to the pups to clean up the mess; Mayor Humdinger creates a cyclone of delicious pies, and the pups must stop it before the town is covered.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups and Katie Stop the Barking Kitty Crew; Pups Save the Glasses
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his barking kitties; Katie and the pups rescue the town; Cap'n Turbot loses his glasses.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Air Rescue: Pups vs. the Hum-Cloud; Air Rescue: Pups Stop the Mid-Air Magnet
programme.desc: Humdinger tries to sabotage the Air Rescue Pups' Air Show; Uncle Otis' powerful magnetic drone goes rogue and starts picking up every metal object in sight.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Chicken Conductor; Pups Save the Digi Tal Stylists
programme.desc: Chickaletta is left driving the train after an enormous chicken floaty launches Engineer Ed out the window; when Katie needs to close the Pet Parlor early, Digi and Tal volunteer to keep the shop open.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger escapes with Cap'n Turbot's performing penguins right before the Adventure Bay Snow Show, Tracker and the PAW Patrol must get them back.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Giant Plant; Pups Get Stuck
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway's gesture of goodwill gift grows out of control when it is planted in the wrong place; Marshall's fire truck becomes mysteriously magnetized.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Space Rock; Pups Save a Good Mayor
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave; when Mayor Goodway goes missing, Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Jungle Pups: Pups Find a Hidden Jungle
programme.desc: Ryder and the pups visit a hidden jungle and must use their new animal vehicles to help Tracker rescue the animal inhabitants from the hot lava and save their home.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock; Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Jake's family cuckoo clock slides down the mountainside with Chickaletta stuck inside; mysterious holes appear all over Ms. Marjorie's yard.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Floating Goodways; Pups Save the Portable Pet Wash
programme.desc: The Goodways drift out to sea on a swan-shaped float and need rescue from a flock of real swans aiming to protect the giant inflatable; Mayor Humdinger steals Katie's Portable Pet Wash and ends up causing bubble trouble all over town.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: Molly performs in the quick-change dress-up match during Fashion Week in Bubbletucky and ends up on the cover of a fashion magazine.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.sub-title: Who's Gonna Play the Big Bad Wolf?
programme.desc: When an actor cannot perform at a play, Deema must take the stage.

programme.title: Bubble Guppies
programme.desc: The Bubble Guppies fly an airplane through the sky.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi
programme.desc: The team must search through Presto's wacky house to rescue him from a magic bubble.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi
programme.desc: Anthony forgets to put a stamp on a package for his grandmother; the team heads to the post office and into the mail system to catch up to the errant package.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pup Pup Goose; Pup Pup and Away
programme.desc: Marshall's new gosling friend gets lost; the PAW Patrol must rescue the mayor from a hot air balloon.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Camping Trip; Pups and the Trouble with Turtles
programme.desc: Skye and Rocky go on a camping trip; Baby turtles start popping up all over town; Ryder and the pups must return baby turtles to their pond.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Ultimate Rescue: Pups Save a Runaway Stargazer
programme.desc: A comet is coming, and the PAW Patrol gets to work building a giant observatory; when the observatory starts rolling out of control, Rubble and the pups need to rebuild everything it has destroyed.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Coach Karima asks Rubble and Crew to build a gym for the gymnastics show but when the beam is too high for Lily, the pups must save the day; Rubble and Crew decide to build a show on their own when a traveling show can't get to Builder Cove.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.sub-title: The Crew Raises a Runway; The Crew Builds a Giant Skateboard
programme.desc: When Buttons the deer needs to cross the Builder Cove airport's runway, Rubble and Crew know just what to build; Rubble and Crew build a large skateboard for Auntie Crane and River's show.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Sea Patrol: Pups Save the Pirated Sea Patroller
programme.desc: Sid the Pirate and Arrby steal the ferris wheel; when the pups set out to bring it back to Adventure Bay, Sid comes up with a sneaky plan to steal the Sea Patroller.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save a Cuckoo Clock; Pups Save Ms. Marjorie's House
programme.desc: Jake's family cuckoo clock slides down the mountainside with Chickaletta stuck inside; mysterious holes appear all over Ms. Marjorie's yard.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Pups Save the Land Pirates; Pups Save the Birdwatching Turbots
programme.desc: When pirates Alex, Julia, Julius and Chick-ARR-letta set sail into the desert and become lost, it's up to the PAW Patrol to save the land pirates; Cap'n Turbot and Francois chirp for help when a bird-watching contest leaves them up in the air.

programme.title: PAW Patrol
programme.sub-title: Mighty Pups, Super Paws: When Super Kitties Attack
programme.desc: When the Kitty Catastrophe crew gets superpowers, the little kittens cause big problems all over town.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Dinosaurs Alive!; Larenzo Lion; Calling Kylie; Hot Dry Day; Playgroup Garden
programme.desc: The playgroup is visiting the zoo today; Mummy Pig and Peppa are at the zoo and meet Larenzo Lion who lives there; it's bedtime and Peppa calls Kylie Kangaroo and is surprised to learn its not morning.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.sub-title: Roller Disco; Weather Station; Talking; Grandpa's Rock Garden; Winter Games
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle has organized a roller disco; the children learn about the weather; there is a new friend for Peppa at her playgroup, Lotte Lama; Grandpa Pig is making a rock garden; Peppa and family go skiing.

programme.title: 200 Pounds Beauty
programme.desc: A famous pop singer decides to have full-body plastic surgery to change her look.

programme.title: Yes, Madam
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger
programme.desc: Agent Jack Ryan (Harrison Ford) becomes acting deputy director of the CIA when Admiral Greer (James Earl Jones) is diagnosed with cancer. When an American businessman, and friend of the president, is murdered on a yacht, Ryan starts discovering links between the man and drug dealers. As CIA agent John Clark (Willem Dafoe) is sent to Colombia to kill drug kingpins in retaliation, Ryan must fight through multiple cover-ups to figure out what happened and who's responsible.

programme.title: True Grit
programme.desc: After an outlaw named Tom Chaney murders her father, feisty 14-year-old farm girl Mattie Ross hires Rooster Cogburn, a boozy, trigger-happy lawman, to help her find Chaney and avenge her father. The bickering duo are not alone in their quest, for a Texas Ranger named LaBoeuf is also tracking Chaney for reasons of his own. Together the unlikely trio ventures into hostile territory to dispense some Old West justice.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby
programme.desc: Frankie Dunn (Clint Eastwood) is a veteran Los Angeles boxing trainer who keeps almost everyone at arm's length, except his old friend and associate Eddie "Scrap Iron" Dupree (Morgan Freeman). When Maggie Fitzgerald (Hilary Swank) arrives in Frankie's gym seeking his expertise, he is reluctant to train the young woman, a transplant from working-class Missouri. Eventually, he relents, and the two form a close bond that will irrevocably change them both.

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Not Without Hope
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as Capt. Timothy Close and his Coast Guard crew launch a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Old School
programme.desc: After discovering his girlfriend has been participating in group sex, attorney Mitch feels his world come undone. He moves into a new place, which happens to be near a college campus, and tries to get his life back together. Two of his best friends, Frank and Beanie, start hanging out at Mitch's house, eventually turning the place into a wild party pad, much to the ire of the college's dean, Gordon "Cheese" Pritchard.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Strange Wilderness
programme.desc: Peter Gaulke takes over when his father, a respected wildlife TV host, dies, but receives far less success. When the show is threatened with cancellation, Peter and his know-nothing crew of stoners and idiots realize that only one creature can save the show: Bigfoot.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: Geophysicist Dr. Josh Keyes discovers that an unknown force has caused the Earth's inner core to stop rotating. With the planet's magnetic field rapidly deteriorating, our atmosphere literally starts to come apart at the seams with catastrophic consequences. To resolve the crisis, Keyes, along with a team of the world's most gifted scientists, travel into the Earth's core. Their mission: detonate a device that will reactivate the core.

programme.title: The Core
programme.desc: Geophysicist Dr. Josh Keyes discovers that an unknown force has caused the Earth's inner core to stop rotating. With the planet's magnetic field rapidly deteriorating, our atmosphere literally starts to come apart at the seams with catastrophic consequences. To resolve the crisis, Keyes, along with a team of the world's most gifted scientists, travel into the Earth's core. Their mission: detonate a device that will reactivate the core.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he can't recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: As Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) ages, he finds that being the head of the Corleone crime family isn't getting any easier. He wants his family out of the Mafia, but the mob kingpin (Eli Wallach) isn't eager to let one of the most powerful and wealthy families go legit. Making matters even worse is Michael's nephew, Vincent (Andy Garcia). Not only does Vincent want a piece of the Corleone family's criminal empire, but he also wants Michael's daughter, Mary (Sofia Coppola).

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a normal relationship with his wife, Kay (Diane Keaton), he is drawn deeper into the family business.

programme.title: Cheech & Chong's Last Movie
programme.desc: Cheech Marin and Tommy Chong discuss their lifelong friendship and popularity as a comedic duo. Features interviews, sketches and never-before-seen footage spanning their five-decade career.

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Baby Driver
programme.desc: Talented getaway driver Baby relies on the beat of his personal soundtrack to be the best in the game. After meeting the woman of his dreams, he sees a chance to ditch his shady lifestyle and make a clean break. Coerced into working for a crime boss, Baby must face the music as a doomed heist threatens his life, love and freedom.

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. It's operated by the Nurse, a no-nonsense, high-tech healer who already has her hands full of a French assassin, an arms dealer and an injured cop. As the violence of the night continues, the Nurse must decide whether to break her own rules and confront what she's worked so hard to avoid.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
programme.desc: Cursed by a devious sorceress, China's ruthless Dragon Emperor (Jet Li) and his vast army lie buried in clay for millennia. When young archaeologist Alex O'Connell is tricked into reviving the emperor, he and his famous parents (Brendan Fraser, Maria Bello) must find a way to send the ghoul back to the grave before he can awaken his vast army and take over the world.

Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside of it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

The sanity of everyone involved is stretched to the limit as the group's quirks cause epic problems as they travel along their interstate route.

programme.desc: Caleb Smith (Domhnall Gleeson) a programmer at a huge Internet company, wins a contest that enables him to spend a week at the private estate of Nathan Bateman (Oscar Isaac), his firm's brilliant CEO. When he arrives, Caleb learns that he has been chosen to be the human component in a Turing test to determine the capabilities and consciousness of Ava (Alicia Vikander), a beautiful robot. However, it soon becomes evident that Ava is far more self-aware and deceptive than either man imagined.

programme.title: About My Father
programme.desc: Encouraged by his fiancee, a man and his father spend the weekend with her wealthy and exceedingly eccentric family. The gathering soon develops into a culture clash, allowing father and son to discover the true meaning of family.

programme.title: Dirty Grandpa
programme.desc: Uptight lawyer Jason Kelly is one week away from marrying his boss's controlling daughter, putting him on the fast track for a partnership at his firm. Tricked by his grandfather Dick, Jason finds himself driving the foulmouthed old man to Daytona Beach, Fla., for a wild spring break that includes frat parties, bar fights and a night of karaoke. While Jason worries about the upcoming wedding, Dick tries to show his grandson how to live life to the fullest.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Reboot
programme.desc: Jay and Silent Bob embark on a cross-country mission to stop Hollywood from filming a reboot based on them.

programme.title: Dogma
programme.desc: Two fallen angels who were ejected from paradise find themselves banned in Wisconsin. They are now headed for New Jersey where they find a loophole that can get them back into heaven. The only catch is that it will destroy humanity. A group bands together to stop them.

programme.title: Zack and Miri Make a Porno
programme.desc: Lifelong friends and now roommates, Zack (Seth Rogen) and Miri (Elizabeth Banks) are buried under a mountain of debt. When the electricity is turned off, they realize that desperate times call for desperate measures. They decide to make an adult film to raise some cash. Though they swear that having sex will not damage their friendship, their business proposition quickly turns into something much more.

programme.title: Clerks II
programme.desc: Now in their 30s, slackers Dante and Randal find that they must change their lives and expand their horizons beyond pop culture and sex. After a disaster at their convenience store ends their employment there, they find new jobs at Mooby's, a fast-food empire.

programme.title: Clerks III
programme.desc: After suffering a massive heart attack, Randal enlists friends and fellow clerks Dante, Elias, Jay and Silent Bob to help him make a movie about life at the Quick Stop.

programme.title: Jay and Silent Bob Reboot
programme.desc: Jay and Silent Bob embark on a cross-country mission to stop Hollywood from filming a reboot based on them.

programme.title: Dogma
programme.desc: Two fallen angels who were ejected from paradise find themselves banned in Wisconsin. They are now headed for New Jersey where they find a loophole that can get them back into heaven. The only catch is that it will destroy humanity. A group bands together to stop them.

programme.title: A Simple Favor
programme.desc: Stephanie is a widowed single mother who works as a vlogger in Connecticut. Her best friend, Emily, seems to have it all, a successful career, a loving family and a glamorous lifestyle. When Emily mysteriously disappears one day, Stephanie launches her own investigation by digging into her friend's past, finding a few surprises along the way.

programme.title: Now You See Me
programme.desc: Charismatic magician Atlas (Jesse Eisenberg) leads a team of talented illusionists called the Four Horsemen. Atlas and his comrades mesmerize audiences with a pair of amazing magic shows that drain the bank accounts of the corrupt and funnel the money to audience members. A federal agent (Mark Ruffalo) and an Interpol detective (Mélanie Laurent) intend to rein in the Horsemen before their next caper, and they turn to Thaddeus (Morgan Freeman), a famous debunker, for help.

programme.title: Now You See Me 2
programme.desc: After fleeing from a stage show, the illusionists known as the Four Horsemen find themselves in more trouble in Macau, China. Devious tech wizard Walter Mabry forces the infamous magicians to steal a powerful chip that can control all the world's computers. Meanwhile, vengeful FBI agent Dylan Rhodes hatches his own plot against Thaddeus Bradley, the man he blames for the death of his father.

programme.title: Operation Fortune: Ruse de guerre
programme.desc: Elite spy Orson Fortune must track down and stop the sale of a deadly new weapons technology wielded by billionaire arms broker Greg Simmonds. Reluctantly teamed up with some of the world's best operatives, Fortune and his crew recruit Hollywood's biggest movie star, Danny Francesco, to help them on their globe-trotting mission to save the world.

programme.title: The Spy Who Dumped Me
programme.desc: Best friends Audrey and Morgan are going about their humdrum lives in Los Angeles -- until Audrey's ex-boyfriend suddenly shows up with a team of deadly assassins on his trail. Unexpectedly thrust into an international conspiracy, the gals soon find themselves dodging killers and a suspicious British agent while hatching a plan to save the world.

programme.title: The Single Moms Club
programme.desc: When their children face expulsion because of rule infractions, five single mothers must agree to organize the school's upcoming dance and fundraiser. Although they range from alpha professional to fast-food worker, the women find they have one thing in common: a need for support and an understanding ear. They form the Single Moms Club to help ease one another's burdens and reclaim their freedom. As their stress begins to lessen, the women find that finding love may be possible again.

programme.desc: The legendary French Quarter takes center stage for a busy night of EMT action, as the technicians treat multiple unconscious patients, a young woman assaulted at a party, and a car accident featuring a victim with a tragic backstory.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Police officer Justin joins the SWAT team in a raid; the first responders treat an accident victim with amnesia and a woman who fell off a roof; Arkady bonds with a man who attempted suicide.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: Mildred Muhammad, ex-wife of the infamous DC Sniper, reveals how the man she loved disintegrated into a monster; Melissa Moore interviews Lee Boyd Malvo in prison.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: On June 12, 2016, Omar Mateen kills 49 people in an Orlando nightclub; Omar's first wife, Sitora Yusufiy, meets a man whose brother was killed in the nightclub attack.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: Randy Hausner reveals how his brother terrorized the city of Phoenix in a killing spree; Randy meets with a shooting survivor and with the son of a man killed by his brother.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.sub-title: Happy Face Killer: Keith Hunter Jesperson
programme.desc: Melissa Moore, daughter of Keith Hunter Jesperson, tells her story as the daughter of a serial killer; Melissa meets a family member of one of her father's victims.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: John Wayne Gacy's sister reveals intimate details of the killer, and returns to her childhood home in Chicago with her daughter.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: Richard Ramirez's ex-sister-in-law and niece come to terms with the evil that existed in their family and meet a survivor of one of Richard's attacks.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.desc: Richard Beasley's daughter Tonya lives with the guilt of teaching her father how to post ads on Craigslist; Tonya meets a man whose father was one of Beasley's four victims.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.sub-title: Classified Ad Rapist: Bobby Joe Long
programme.desc: A woman discusses how her childhood sweetheart turned into a murdering rapist; being a child of a serial killer.

programme.title: Monster in My Family
programme.sub-title: Spokane Serial Killer: Robert Lee Yates
programme.desc: Amber and Michelle Yates discuss being raised by a man who terrorized the city of Spokane, Wash.; in an effort to find healing, the Yates sisters meet with the sister of one of their father's victims.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Cynthia Vigil recounts her incredible act of survival and strength and describes how she put an end to the horror brought on by the Toy Box Killer.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Morgan Rowan describes how she was brutally attacked in 1968 by Rodney Alcala during a party at his Hollywood home; three weeks later, Alcala would abduct and attack 8-year-old Tali Shapiro, who describes her chilling assault in her own words.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer
programme.desc: Jennifer Asbenson recounts her fight to stay alive and escape the clutches of 32-year-old Andrew Urdiales, her would-be killer who kidnapped her in September 1992 when she 17.

programme.title: I Survived a Serial Killer

programme.title: The Eleven

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Money and greed tear two close-knit California families apart.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man steals millions of dollars by conning numerous women and businesses over 25 years; one woman brings together a group of his victims to hold him accountable and make him face justice.

programme.title: Crossworlds
programme.desc: A magic crystal leads a college student (Josh Charles) and an adventurer (Rutger Hauer) on a surreal quest to save the world.

programme.title: Psych:9
programme.desc: Disturbing events at a mysterious hospital may uncover the truth behind a series of murders.

programme.title: Night Train to Lisbon
programme.desc: Swiss professor Raimund Gregorius abandons his life to embark on a thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Soul Survivors
programme.desc: Sometimes living or dying comes down to a matter of choice. It took Annabel (Eliza Dushku) and Matt (Wes Bentley) to help their shattered friend make that choice -- help that would prove a killer journey. A college freshman Cassandra Cassie (Melissa Sagemiller) steps into a nightmare of otherworldly visitations after surviving a devastating car accident.

programme.title: Friend Request
programme.desc: Laura is a popular college student who graciously accepts an online friend request from Marina, a young social outcast. To everyone's shock, Marina takes her own life after Laura decides to unfriend her. Soon, a disturbing and mysterious video appears on Laura's profile and her contacts slowly dwindle. When her friends suddenly begin to die one by one, the frightened young woman must figure out a way to stop the carnage before it's too late.

programme.title: Trap City
programme.desc: Rapper caught in drug trade becomes overnight sensation with viral hit song. Facing prison, he must choose between his rising fame and testifying against a dangerous criminal.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. Their mission successful, Schultz frees Django, and together they hunt the South's most-wanted criminals. Their travels take them to the infamous plantation of shady Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio), where Django's long-lost wife (Kerry Washington) is still a slave.

programme.title: Psych:9
programme.desc: Disturbing events at a mysterious hospital may uncover the truth behind a series of murders.

programme.title: Most Likely to Murder
programme.desc: When Billy, the coolest kid in high school, comes back to his hometown 15 years later to find he's no longer cool and the girl he still has feelings for now dates the former town outcast, he sets out to prove that his rival is actually a murderer.

programme.title: Nothing Left to Fear
programme.desc: A pastor (James Tupper) his wife (Anne Heche) and their daughters encounter malevolent forces in a small Kansas town.

programme.title: Django Unchained
programme.desc: Two years before the Civil War, Django (Jamie Foxx), a slave, finds himself accompanying an unorthodox German bounty hunter named Dr. King Schultz (Christoph Waltz) on a mission to capture the vicious Brittle brothers. Their mission successful, Schultz frees Django, and together they hunt the South's most-wanted criminals. Their travels take them to the infamous plantation of shady Calvin Candie (Leonardo DiCaprio), where Django's long-lost wife (Kerry Washington) is still a slave.

programme.title: Turbulence 2: Fear of Flying
programme.desc: After finishing a therapy program intended to conquer a fear of flying, the patients mark their accomplishment with a plane trip to Los Angeles. Unfortunately, their progress is immediately undone when terrorists take over their flight and kill the pilot, forcing one of the aviation-wary passengers to land the airplane. Mild-mannered Martin (Craig Sheffer) reluctantly takes on the challenge as the remaining hostages, including the beautiful Jessica (Jennifer Beals), struggle to survive.

programme.title: All Souls Day: Dia de los Muertos
programme.desc: When young lovers Joss (Travis Wester) and Alicia (Marisa Ramirez) arrive in a small Mexican town, they inadvertently stumble upon an attempted human sacrifice. Eventually they find their way to the local sheriff, Blanco (David Keith), and begin to piece together the supernatural puzzle, which involves the dead rising from their graves. As the village's dark history is revealed, it becomes clear that the evil stems from the immortal Vargas Diaz (Danny Trejo), who must be stopped at any cost.

programme.title: Beat
programme.desc: The true story of two murders that shaped the lives of several college students who went on to become some of the most influential writers of the Beat Generation.

programme.title: The Driver
programme.desc: A father fights to rescue his family from the undead when an attack destroys their survival compound.

programme.title: The Driver
programme.desc: A father fights to rescue his family from the undead when an attack destroys their survival compound.

programme.title: Free Money
programme.desc: Prison warden Sven Sorenson (Marlon Brando) uses corrupt judge Rolf Rausenberg (Donald Sutherland) to enforce his wishes, making both men feared by their small town's residents. When Sven's twin daughters are impregnated by Bud (Charlie Sheen) and Larry (Thomas Haden Church), he forces both couples to marry. Fed up with tyrannical Sven, his sons-in-law decide to rob a passing train and make their escape. Meanwhile, Rolf's FBI agent daughter, Karen (Mira Sorvino), arrives to investigate Sven.

programme.title: The Spore
programme.desc: The lives of 10 strangers intersect as a mutating fungus begins to spread through a small town, wiping out everyone that comes into contact with it.

programme.title: Slow Burn
programme.desc: As ambitious District Attorney Ford Cole (Ray Liotta) prepares for his mayoral bid, he faces conflicting stories surrounding a man's death. His assistant DA and sometime lover, Nora Timmer (Jolene Blalock), claims that the man tried to rape her. However, witness Luther Pinks (LL Cool J) tells a different tale. He says that, actually, she tried to seduce the victim to gather information about a mob chieftain.

programme.title: Say Nothing
programme.desc: Grace (Nastassja Kinski) feels smothered by her marriage. Her husband, Matt (Hart Bochner), is unemployed and drinks too much. Matt has also stopped paying attention to her sexually, which eventually sends Grace off to Miami Beach, Fla., to get away from it all. While there, she meets a man, Julian (William Baldwin), with whom she has a one-night stand. When Grace returns home, Matt has suddenly cleaned up his act and started working again. But then Julian reappears, and things get complicated.

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: After enduring setbacks in her television career, executive Joanna Eberhart (Nicole Kidman) relocates with her family from New York City to the Connecticut suburb of Stepford. While Joanna's husband, Walter (Matthew Broderick), quickly warms up to their new town, she has a hard time adjusting to Stepford's manicured environs and the overly accommodating attitude of the area women. Soon Joanna begins to suspect that something is not right, and she tries to uncover Stepford's secret.

programme.title: Midnight Movies: From the Margin to the Mainstream
programme.desc: Filmmaker Stuart Samuels examines six cult movies that gained a late-night following, including "Night of the Living Dead," "Pink Flamingos" and "Eraserhead."

programme.title: Camp Pleasant Lake
programme.desc: Strange events plague a couple when they open a camp on a haunted site that connects them to a 20-year-old mystery involving a missing girl and a brutal crime.

programme.title: Love and a .45
programme.desc: Small-time criminal Watty Watts (Gil Bellows) attempts to rob a convenience store with his drug-addict buddy, Billy Mack Black (Rory Cochrane). The robbery, however, leads to murder, and soon Watty leaves Billy behind and goes on the run with his beloved girlfriend, Starlene (Renée Zellweger). Heading toward Mexico, the fugitive couple gets plenty of media coverage, until there are even more people on their trail. Can Watty and Starlene make it south of the border without getting caught?

programme.title: The Stepford Wives
programme.desc: After enduring setbacks in her television career, executive Joanna Eberhart (Nicole Kidman) relocates with her family from New York City to the Connecticut suburb of Stepford. While Joanna's husband, Walter (Matthew Broderick), quickly warms up to their new town, she has a hard time adjusting to Stepford's manicured environs and the overly accommodating attitude of the area women. Soon Joanna begins to suspect that something is not right, and she tries to uncover Stepford's secret.

programme.title: The Girl in the Park
programme.desc: Julia's (Sigourney Weaver) pain and despair from losing her daughter resurface when she meets Louise (Kate Bosworth).

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: In a small island community, a troubled young woman falls for a mysterious outsider who empowers her to escape her oppressive family. When he comes under suspicion for a series of murders, she defends him at all costs.

programme.title: Red Clover
programme.desc: Karen is unaware that decades earlier, townspeople banished a bloodthirsty leprechaun to another dimension after a massacre. She accidentally sets the creature free, and has to convince her father to help send it away again.

programme.title: Our Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Grace and Chance celebrate their one-year anniversary with friends, but things quickly devolve as people begin disappearing one by one.

programme.title: Godsend
programme.desc: After Paul Duncan (Greg Kinnear) and his wife, Jessie (Rebecca Romijn-Stamos), lose their young son, Adam (Cameron Bright), in an accident, they are approached by Richard Wells (Robert De Niro), a fertility doctor. Wells believes that he can clone Adam and gives Paul and Jessie the option to let him try, but only if they start life over elsewhere. Adam's clone proves to be identical to the deceased boy, but, when he reaches his 8th birthday, things begin to go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Open House
programme.desc: A murderous couple invade a woman's (Rachel Blanchard) home and hold her captive in the basement.

programme.title: House of 1000 Corpses
programme.desc: An empty fuel tank and a flat tire lead two couples down a terror-riddled road to the House of 1000 Corpses. House of 1000 Corpses is at its core a story of family - a cast of twisted individuals who, with each slash of a throat or stab thru the chest, add bodies to their sick human menagerie.

programme.title: 3 From Hell
programme.desc: Crazed killers Baby Firefly, Captain Spaulding and Otis Driftwood unleash bloody mayhem after escaping from prison.

programme.title: Show Dogs
programme.desc: After a failed attempt to recover a stolen baby panda, police dog Max reluctantly teams up with a human FBI agent named Frank. A hot tip leads Max and Frank to Las Vegas for the world's most exclusive dog show. To find the panda, Max goes under cover as a contestant to get the lowdown from his fellow canines. With help from their new friends, the crime-fighting duo must now foil another kidnapping plot and rescue other valuable animals from a gang of greedy smugglers.

programme.title: Sound of My Voice
programme.desc: California couple Peter (Christopher Denham) and Lorna (Nicole Vicius) set out to make a documentary meant to expose a charismatic cult leader named Maggie (Brit Marling) as a fraud. Maggie claims to be from the year 2054 and is seemingly allergic to almost everything in her environment; she lives in a basement, subsisting on canned oxygen, homegrown food and the blood of her acolytes. Though at first, Peter and Lorna are adamant that Maggie is a fake, they both soon fall under her spell.

programme.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
programme.desc: Everyone in the Portokalos family worries about Toula (Nia Vardalos). Still unmarried at 30 years old, she works at Dancing Zorba's, the Greek restaurant owned by her parents, Gus (Michael Constantine) and Maria (Lainie Kazan). After taking a job at her aunt's travel agency, she falls in love with Ian Miller (John Corbett), a teacher who is tall, handsome and definitely not Greek. Toula isn't sure which will be more upsetting to her father, that Ian is a foreigner or that he's a vegetarian.

programme.title: We Are Your Friends
programme.desc: Young Cole Carter (Zac Efron) dreams of hitting the big time as a Hollywood disc jockey, spending his days and nights hanging with buddies and working on the one track that will set the world on fire. Opportunity comes knocking when he meets James Reed, a charismatic DJ who takes the 23-year-old under his wing. Soon, his seemingly clear path to success gets complicated when he starts falling for his mentor's girlfriend, jeopardizing his new friendship and the future he seems destined to fulfill.

programme.title: Ruby Sparks
programme.desc: Young author Calvin Weir-Fields (Paul Dano), once a literary darling, is having trouble composing his next novel. Following a therapist's advice, Calvin pulls out an old manual typewriter and creates a vivacious, flame-haired woman he dubs Ruby Sparks (Zoe Kazan). Overnight, Ruby leaps from the page into Calvin's home as a real flesh-and-blood woman. And, what's more, she's unaware that she's actually a fictional character and that her actions and feelings are dictated by whatever Calvin writes.

programme.title: Skiptrace
programme.desc: A detective from Hong Kong teams up with an American gambler to battle a Chinese criminal.

programme.title: Oracle
programme.desc: A young woman accepts a job on a property with a traumatic past. Upon her arrival, she soon realizes that the nightmares of her childhood are connected to the evil in the house.

programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novitiate on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.title: The Nun II
programme.desc: An evil spreads in 1956 France as a priest is murdered and Sister Irene once again comes face-to-face with the demonic nun Valak.

programme.title: The Devil's Rejects
programme.desc: After a raid on the rural home of the psychopathic Firefly family, two members of the clan, Otis (Bill Moseley) and Baby (Sheri Moon Zombie), manage to flee the scene. Heading to a remote desert motel, the killers reunite with Baby's father, Capt. Spaulding (Sid Haig), who is equally demented and intent on maintaining their murder spree. While the trio continues to torment and kill various victims, the vengeful Sheriff Wydell (William Forsythe) slowly closes in on them.

programme.title: It
programme.desc: Seven young outcasts in Derry, Maine, are about to face their worst nightmare -- an ancient, shape-shifting evil that emerges from the sewer every 27 years to prey on the town's children. Banding together over the course of one horrifying summer, the friends must overcome their own personal fears to battle the murderous, bloodthirsty clown known as Pennywise.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy the shape-shifting Pennywise -- now more powerful than ever.

programme.title: It: Chapter Two
programme.desc: Defeated by members of the Losers' Club, the evil clown Pennywise returns 27 years later to terrorize the town of Derry, Maine, once again. Now adults, the childhood friends have long since gone their separate ways. But when people start disappearing, Mike Hanlon calls the others home for one final stand. Damaged by scars from the past, the united Losers must conquer their deepest fears to destroy the shape-shifting Pennywise -- now more powerful than ever.

programme.title: The Flash
programme.desc: Worlds collide when the Flash uses his superpowers to travel back in time to change the events of the past. However, when his attempt to save his family inadvertently alters the future, he becomes trapped in a reality in which General Zod has returned, threatening annihilation. With no other superheroes to turn to, the Flash looks to coax a very different Batman out of retirement and rescue an imprisoned Kryptonian -- albeit not the one he's looking for.

programme.title: Christmas With the Kranks
programme.desc: Finally alone for the holidays, Luther (Tim Allen) and Nora Krank (Jamie Lee Curtis) plan to eschew the Christmas traditions and take a cruise in the Caribbean instead. This doesn't sit well with their Christmas-obsessed neighbors Vic Frohmeyer (Dan Aykroyd) and Walt Scheel (M. Emmet Walsh), who are determined to win the annual "best decorated street" competition, and the Kranks soon find themselves social outcasts because of their lack of Christmas spirit.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After ratting out his Mafia cohorts, Giovanni Manzoni (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a French town. Despite the best efforts of their handler (Tommy Lee Jones) to keep them in line, Giovanni (now called Fred Blake), his wife (Michelle Pfeiffer) and children (Dianna Agron, John D'Leo) can't help but resort to doing things the "family" way. However, their dependence on such old habits places everyone in danger from vengeful mobsters.

programme.title: The Alto Knights
programme.desc: In the 1950s, notorious New York crime bosses Frank Costello and Vito Genovese vie for control of the city streets. Once the best of friends, petty jealousies and a series of betrayals place them on a deadly collision course that reshapes organized crime forever.

programme.title: Fargo
programme.desc: "Fargo" is a reality-based crime drama set in Minnesota in 1987. Jerry Lundegaard (William H. Macy) is a car salesman in Minneapolis who has gotten himself into debt and is so desperate for money that he hires two thugs (Steve Buscemi), (Peter Stormare) to kidnap his own wife. Jerry will collect the ransom from her wealthy father (Harve Presnell), paying the thugs a small portion and keeping the rest to satisfy his debts. The scheme collapses when the thugs shoot a state trooper.

programme.title: The Watch
programme.desc: In Glenview, Ohio, four pals, Evan, Bob, Franklin and Jamarcus, form a neighborhood watch group. Armed with flashlights, walkie-talkies and spiffy new jackets, the guys try to take their mission seriously, even if they spend a little time goofing off now and then. But when they discover aliens living among them and no one believes their story, they learn that they have to kick things up a notch to save the world from annihilation.

programme.title: It's Complicated
programme.desc: Jane (Meryl Streep), a successful restaurateur, has been divorced from Jake (Alec Baldwin) for many years, although they remain friends. When an innocent meal together turns into an affair, Jane finds that she is the other woman in the now-remarried Jake's life. Meanwhile, Adam (Steve Martin), an architect hired to remodel her kitchen, is still stinging from his own divorce. He finds himself falling in love with Jane but soon realizes that he has become part of a triangle.

programme.title: Adult Best Friends
programme.desc: Katie takes her best friend, Delaney, on a nostalgic trip to their childhood hometown to tell her she's getting married. Their journey soon takes some unexpected turns courtesy of a bizarre rental homeowner, a chance encounter with a former classmate, a bachelor party, and a few potential love interests.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: After moving to Paris, author Sidonie-Gabrielle Colette agrees to ghostwrite a semi-autobiographical novel for her husband. Its success soon inspires her to fight for creative ownership and overcome the societal constraints of the early 20th century.

programme.title: Companion
programme.desc: A weekend getaway at a remote cabin turns to chaos when it's revealed that one of the guests -- a subservient android built for human companionship -- has gone haywire.

programme.title: Opus
programme.desc: A journalist is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared 30 years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants, she gets caught in the middle of his twisted plan.

programme.title: Marie Antoinette
programme.desc: An Austrian teenager (Kirsten Dunst) marries the Dauphin (Jason Schwartzman) of France and becomes that country's queen following the death of King Louis XV (Judy Davis) in 1774. Years later, after a life of luxury and privilege, Marie Antoinette loses her head during the French Revolution.

programme.title: Broken City
programme.desc: Former cop Billy Taggart (Mark Wahlberg) sees a chance at redemption for past sins when New York City's Mayor Nicolas Hostetler (Russell Crowe) calls on him for a special job. Hostetler thinks his wife, Cathleen (Catherine Zeta-Jones), is having an affair and that it may hurt his chances for re-election. However, a bigger scandal than expected pulls in Billy right at the start of his investigation. Double-crossed by the mayor, Billy begins a relentless quest for justice.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: Crushing melons with thighs; dance routine.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: Brazilian cross dressers and out-of-control bounty hunters; a reverend who curses up a storm; insane mixed martial arts.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: A flask for your butt; doughnut security system.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: The wildest motorheads on the road, in the sky and on the water.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: An out-of-control security guard; a dancer who kills it at a funeral.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers pretend to be bellhops and need to do and say what they're told while assisting unsuspecting guests to their rooms. Then, the guys need to give away tickets to an absurd made-up show they can no longer see.

programme.title: House Party
programme.desc: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James.

programme.title: Blue Beetle
programme.desc: Jaime Reyes suddenly finds himself in possession of an ancient relic of alien biotechnology called the Scarab. When the Scarab chooses Jaime to be its symbiotic host, he's bestowed with an incredible suit of armor that's capable of extraordinary and unpredictable powers, forever changing his destiny as he becomes the superhero Blue Beetle.

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.sub-title: Tampa Bay Lightning at Montreal Canadiens
programme.desc: The Lightning face the Canadiens in Game 3 at Bell Centre. After Josh Anderson gave Montreal a 2-1 lead, Nikita Kucherov tied it at 12:33 of the third to force OT. J.J. Moser scored at 12:48 into OT to seal the Lightning's win in Game 2.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Edmonton Oilers take on the Anaheim Ducks at Honda Center for Game 3 of the West first round. The Ducks won Game 2 to tie the series. Cutter Gauthier's second goal of the night broke a 4-4 tie late in the third period to seal the win.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: Failed college coach Norman Dale gets a chance at redemption when he is hired to direct the basketball program at a high school in a tiny Indiana town. After a teacher persuades star player Jimmy Chitwood to quit and focus on his long-neglected studies, Dale struggles to develop a winning team in the face of community criticism for his temper and his unconventional choice of assistant coach: Shooter, a notorious alcoholic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes
programme.desc: Sal wrote fan letters to a celebrity as a kid; Murr loves a certain grocery game; how the guys found Sloppy Joe, who helped make Q's first Jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: A motorcycle crash, an out of control skydiver and an angry bison.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: Boneheaded partiers throw down; an overzealous Willie Nelson fan; drunken keg stand.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back playing lawyers, trying to convince unsuspecting focus group participants to sign off on ridiculous terms and conditions before they go in. Then they put their family businesses to the test by asking strangers if their radio ad is good to stay on the air. Later, one joker will be getting revenge in an elaborate punishment that the other two are really going to feel.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are hitting the floor as restaurant owners of a New York Pizzeria, forced to say and do whatever wacky things the other guys tell them to. Later, they're back at Tompkins Square bagels trying to hunt down a customer that left a scathing review. Then, the losing joker is in for a punishment that really sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are hitting the floor as restaurant owners of a New York Pizzeria, forced to say and do whatever wacky things the other guys tell them to. Later, they're back at Tompkins Square bagels trying to hunt down a customer that left a scathing review. Then, the losing joker is in for a punishment that really sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers' mothers visit as overprotective parents meeting a Joker's girlfriend; a Joker must convince a stranger to pose as his girlfriend for a Broadway outing with his mother.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are back at Colonial Diner, offering some new bizarre specials to unsuspecting patrons; they take a ride through the park; after a nasty fall, the Joker must get park goers to help them out from underneath their bike.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Steve's life is turned upside down when Snot gets rich after his mom starts selling a new dipping sauce; Klaus, Stan, Roger and Jeff become mall fashion show models.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan reluctantly invites Roger into his ham club; Francine decides to scare Greg.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Thanks to Roger, Snot discovers his dead father was a demolition derby driver; Hayley takes Steve on a road trip so he can learn to drive.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger tries to force Hayley into graduating from community college so he can move into her room; Klaus repairs Francine's car.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger helps Stan enter Francine's dreams after he becomes insecure about their contents.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Klaus leaves the family after one too many harassments; 15 years later, they reconnect for his funeral.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Roger helps Francine with her terrible cooking by bringing her to a remote Patagonian island; Stan gets a nail in his head and can't speak.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.sub-title: The Hand that Rocks the Rogu
programme.desc: Steve babysits Roger's ex-tumour, Rogu, to prove to Francine that he's ready for the responsibility Stan and Francine get into trouble in their respective clubs.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Hayley drives Steve to a testing center in no-good downtown, but they end up stranded in a worse suburban neighborhood; Stan, Francine and Roger mistakenly go downtown to rescue them.

programme.title: Hoosiers
programme.desc: Failed college coach Norman Dale gets a chance at redemption when he is hired to direct the basketball program at a high school in a tiny Indiana town. After a teacher persuades star player Jimmy Chitwood to quit and focus on his long-neglected studies, Dale struggles to develop a winning team in the face of community criticism for his temper and his unconventional choice of assistant coach: Shooter, a notorious alcoholic.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes face the Senators in Game 4 of the East first round at Canadian Tire Centre. Carolina leads 3-0 after a Game 3 win. Logan Stankoven opened the scoring for the third straight game. Frederik Andersen made 21 saves in the 2-1 victory.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Stars face the Wild in Game 4 of the West first round at Grand Casino Arena. Dallas leads 2-1 after a 4-3 win. Joel Eriksson Ek and Mike McCarron scored for Minnesota, but Wyatt Johnston's double-OT goal at 12:10 secured the Dallas victory.

programme.title: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Flyers take on the Penguins in Game 4 of the East First Round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Leading 3-0 after two road wins, the Flyers scored three second-period goals on four shots. Trevor Zegras and Noah Cates each had a goal in the home victory.

programme.title: The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey
programme.desc: Bilbo Baggins lives a simple life with his fellow hobbits in the Shire, until the wizard Gandalf arrives and convinces him to join a group of dwarves on a quest to reclaim the kingdom of Erebor. The journey takes Bilbo on a path through treacherous lands swarming with orcs, goblins and other dangers, not the least of which is an encounter with Gollum and a simple gold ring that is tied to the fate of Middle Earth in ways Bilbo cannot even fathom.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers are unsympathetic store managers, forced to throw out a disruptive customer before dealing with the wrath and disdain of fellow patrons; thus the guys must get a bystander to take their side during a heated argument with their fake spouses.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q, and Joe serve up some mischief at White Castle, take on tourists in Times Square, and check out customers in a warehouse store.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: Tricks include a wake up call, telekinesis and a body in the trunk of a taxi.

programme.title: World's Dumbest ...
programme.desc: A bird feeder with a high-voltage surprise; a bowl made entirely of bacon; a wacky way to grow bananas at home.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys get liberal with lotion down at the shore, shop from other people's carts in a supermarket, and try to scam their way to a free dish of yogurt.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Friends compete to embarrass each other; speed dating with the world's worst pickup lines; phony fortunes on the boardwalk; getting personal in the hygiene aisle of a pharmacy.

programme.title: Amarte es mi pecado
programme.desc: Arturo le advierte a Alfredo que no vuelva a molestar a Nora. Heriberto le exige a Isaura que le regrese el dinero que pagó por Nora o que se la entregue.

programme.desc: Ernesto, desesperado por ver a Nico, se disculpa con Elena. Robles reunió las pruebas de la usurpación de Miguel Hernández.

programme.title: Tres veces Ana
programme.desc: Iñaki acepta dar parte de su hígado a Daniel a cambio de una gran cantidad de dinero. Ana Leticia se hace pasar por Ana Laura para reencontrarse con Marcelo.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Isabela se enoja mucho al ver a Fernando y Ana besándose. Johnny le confiesa a Ana que Isabela está tratando de seducirlo. Dana le informa a Ana que Doroteo verá a Corcuera para que puedan grabarlo.

programme.desc: Una mujer está casada con el dueño de una fábrica de talavera en un mundo lleno de felicidad, menos una dama caprichosa que solo busca ser feliz destruyendo la vida de los demás.

programme.title: Te doy la vida
programme.desc: Nico se pierde cuando huye de Ernesto para buscar a Pedro. Todos, desesperados, intentan encontrarlo.

programme.title: Te doy la vida
programme.desc: Elena sale de la cárcel bajo fianza y se reencuentra con Pedro. Nico aparece y rechaza a Ernesto por el daño que le causó a su madre.

programme.title: Te doy la vida
programme.sub-title: Sin ti mi vida no tiene sentido
programme.desc: Elena y Nico se reencuentran, pero una representante del DIF les informa que ni ella ni Ernesto son aptos para cuidar al niño.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Nando le confiesa a Edith que la visita de Ximena lo confundió; Fernando besa a Ana frente a Nando; Isabela le llama a Johnny para hacerle una propuesta.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Bruno le pide a Fernando y Johnny que se disfracen de Reyes Magos para darles regalos a los niños con cáncer. Fernando y Johnny se sorprenden porque Bruno ya no tartamudea. Fernando toma por error la bolsa con los vestuarios de Ana.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Fernando, Bruno y Johnny son confundidos con unos asaltantes y la policía los detiene. La policía revisa el auto, encuentra los vestuarios de Ana y Fernando reconoce el antifaz de Lola, pero Johnny logra confundirlo.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Fernando y los niños preparan una maravillosa sorpresa para Ana. Fernando le entrega una joya con siete anillos a Ana representando la vida de cada uno de sus hijos y le pide que sea su novia.

programme.title: Mi corazón es tuyo
programme.desc: Isabela se enoja mucho al ver a Fernando y Ana besándose. Johnny le confiesa a Ana que Isabela está tratando de seducirlo. Dana le informa a Ana que Doroteo verá a Corcuera para que puedan grabarlo.

programme.title: MLB Baseball
programme.sub-title: Seattle Mariners at St. Louis Cardinals
programme.desc: Mariners travels to St. Louis to face the Cardinals in the first of three games in Missouri. Julio Rodríguez and the Mariners look for road win against Masyn Winn's Cardinals. St. Louis relies on home-field advantage to spark its NL Central campaign.
